_comment: gRPC source build manifest for grpc-source-build. SHA256 is self-computed from the vendored tarball at time of pinning (2026-03-17). gRPC does not publish official SHA256 checksums for source archives.

grpc._source_note: Flat source extraction — no .git directory, no git submodules. All third_party/ dependencies are included inline.

sha256_reassembled._note: Single-part archive — part-aa SHA256 equals the reassembled tarball SHA256. gRPC does not publish official checksums; hash self-computed at time of vendoring.

build_requirements._note: After running setup.sh to extract the source tree, use setup_grpc.bat (Windows) to configure and build with CMake.
